title: elatostema volubile
intro: Elatostema volubile is a type of flowering plant, also known as the 'Creeping False Daisy' or 'False Daisy Vine', that belongs to the Urticaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in China, India, and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Elatostema volubile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health problems, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
